scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:sdk && npm run typecheck:cli
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test:vectors
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify && npm run smoke:pack
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm run publish:dry-run:sdk && npm run publish:dry-run:cli
scripts.release:check: npm run verify:release && npm run publish:dry-run && npm run release:audit
